seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Old Calperum and Old Reynella. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Old Calperum vs Old Reynella: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Old Calperum and Old Reynella.
heading: Old Calperum vs Old Reynella — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Old Calperum, South Australia and Old Reynella, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Old Calperum has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Old Reynella (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Old Calperum or Old Reynella safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Old Calperum has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Old Reynella scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Old Calperum scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Old Reynella scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Old Calperum or Old Reynella?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Old Calperum has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
